_doc: Coverage sectional — Ranking & Clocks. Original rows for official RRB NTPC syllabus coverage.

questions.stem_en: In a row of 40 candidates, Ravi is 12th from the left. What is his rank from the right?
questions.stem_hi: 40 candidates की row में Ravi left से 12th है। Right से उसका rank क्या है?

options.label: B
options.trap_reason_en: Forgot to add 1 in opposite rank: right rank = total - left rank + 1.
options.trap_reason_hi: Opposite rank में +1 भूल गए: right rank = total - left rank + 1।

options.label: C
options.trap_reason_en: Copied the left rank as right rank without converting sides.
options.trap_reason_hi: Left rank को right rank में convert किए बिना copy कर दिया।

options.label: D
options.trap_reason_en: Added total and rank, which gives a count beyond the row size.
options.trap_reason_hi: Total और rank add कर दिए, जिससे row size से बाहर count आता है।

questions.explanation_method_en: Right rank = 40 - 12 + 1 = 29. Therefore, answer = 29.
questions.explanation_concept_en: For rank from the opposite side, the person's position is counted in both directions, so add 1 after subtracting from total. Final answer is 29.
questions.explanation_method_hi: Right rank = 40 - 12 + 1 = 29। अतः answer = 29।
questions.explanation_concept_hi: Opposite-side rank में person दोनों sides की counting में शामिल होता है, इसलिए total से subtract करके +1 करते हैं। Final answer 29 है।

questions.stem_en: Find the smaller angle between clock hands at 3:10.
questions.stem_hi: 3:10 पर clock hands के बीच smaller angle ज्ञात करें।

options.label: B
options.trap_reason_en: Ignored the hour hand's 10 minutes movement after the hour.
options.trap_reason_hi: Hour hand की 10 minutes वाली movement ignore कर दी।

options.label: C
options.trap_reason_en: Used the larger reflex angle instead of the smaller angle.
options.trap_reason_hi: Smaller angle की जगह larger reflex angle ले लिया।

options.label: D
options.trap_reason_en: Reported the minute hand's angle from 12, not the angle between both hands.
options.trap_reason_hi: Minute hand का 12 से angle दे दिया, दोनों hands के बीच angle नहीं।

questions.explanation_method_en: Hour hand = 95°, minute hand = 60°, smaller difference = 35°. Therefore, answer = 35°.
questions.explanation_concept_en: Clock-angle questions require both hands' positions. The hour hand moves 0.5° per minute, so it is not fixed at the hour mark after minutes pass. Final answer is 35°.
questions.explanation_method_hi: Hour hand = 95°, minute hand = 60°, smaller difference = 35°। अतः answer = 35°।
questions.explanation_concept_hi: Clock-angle में दोनों hands की position चाहिए। Hour hand 0.5° per minute चलता है, इसलिए minutes pass होने पर hour mark पर fixed नहीं रहता। Final answer 35° है।

questions.explanation_concept_hi: Clock-angle में दोनों hands की position चाहिए। Hour hand 0.5° per minute चलता है, इसलिए minutes pass होने पर hour mark पर fixed नहीं रहता। Final answer 40° है।

questions.stem_en: Find the smaller angle between clock hands at 7:20.
questions.stem_hi: 7:20 पर clock hands के बीच smaller angle ज्ञात करें।

options.label: A
options.trap_reason_en: Ignored the hour hand's 20 minutes movement after the hour.
options.trap_reason_hi: Hour hand की 20 minutes वाली movement ignore कर दी।

options.label: C
options.trap_reason_en: Used the larger reflex angle instead of the smaller angle.
options.trap_reason_hi: Smaller angle की जगह larger reflex angle ले लिया।

options.label: D
options.trap_reason_en: Reported the minute hand's angle from 12, not the angle between both hands.
options.trap_reason_hi: Minute hand का 12 से angle दे दिया, दोनों hands के बीच angle नहीं।
